extension.description: Addon for the Corridor Digital videos
extension.disclaimer: All videos are provided by Corridor Digital (www.corridordigital.com)
extension.news: v1.1.0: Full rewrite to new corridordigital.com API. Login now uses /v2/account/login (JWT). Browse via pages/v1 and channels/v16 APIs. FlareSolverr support for Cloudflare bypass.
